1.name: ExposureOfSensitiveInformation
1.Note: Exception messages may leak sensitive info; ensure safe logging and user-friendly messages.

2.name: CodeQuality_AvoidEmptyCatch
2.Note: Empty catch hides unexpected errors and makes debugging hard.

3.name: ImproperHandlingOfExceptionalConditions
3.Note: Catching System.Exception is broad; prefer specific exceptions and better error handling.
